## Use Case

Describe the problem you're trying to solve. What are you trying to accomplish?

## Proposed Solution

Your suggested approach. How should this work?

## Alternatives Considered

Other solutions or workarounds you've considered and why they fall short.

## Examples

Code, `.void` file snippets, or mockups showing how the feature would work.

// Example usage

## Additional Context

Any other context, links, or references relevant to the feature request.
